text: Created ticket Implement SQLite backend and deterministic projections

Implemented the SQLite backend and deterministic projection layer in `@pi-loom/pi-storage`. Added `storage/sqlite.ts` with the canonical catalog schema for spaces, repositories, worktrees, entities, links, events, and projections; `storage/catalog.ts` with workspace import plus repo-materialized projection generation; and supporting modules for projection classification, locations, repository identity, and stable IDs. Verified round-trip behavior with tests that import current-style `.loom` state into SQLite, preserve repo-relative path scopes, reconstruct main constitution/docs/spec markdown bodies in the repo, and retain imported initiative/ticket/spec links. Verified with `npx biome check packages/pi-storage`, `npm test -- --run packages/pi-storage/__tests__/contract.test.ts packages/pi-storage/__tests__/catalog.test.ts`, and `npm run typecheck`.

During the critique cycle, `packages/pi-storage/storage/catalog.ts` and `packages/pi-storage/storage/projections.ts` were refined so imported ticket links now honor both `deps` and `dependencies`, and durable worker history under `.loom/workers/` is imported while runtime-local launch descriptors remain excluded. This closes the two correctness gaps found in the initial critique run.
